description: Product Description Wmcaps wolly hat for men and women, stretchy one size for most knitted acrylic unisex fisherman skullcap Products Features: - Beanie with classical design, All-round warmth in most season. - Comfortable soft materials, provides cozy touching experience. - Delicate Sewing, delicate sewing thread, provide the added durability. - Suitable for men and women of all ages, and they are noble and generous, easy to match with men's and women's winter clothes. - Comes with beautiful package, perfect gifts for dad, mom, boyfriends, girlfriends, him or her when the cold weather comes. Soft & Cozy The beanie is made of soft acrylic, keep your head and ears warm, while doing some outdoor sports in cold weather, like walking the pets, cycling, running, hiking, skiing, snowboarding ect. Strechable The knit beanie is stretchable, fit for both mens and womens with stretchy fibers for comfort, suitable for most people's head size. Premium Quality Authentic WMCAPS logo print on suede. Classic design adds one more bright spot to the outfit when worn, make you stylish and eye catching.
